items.label: Arrivals · pregame landing
items.title: Arrivals · Pregame Landing
items.zone: Downtown Reno · Zone A (7th St north to Truckee River)
items.summary: Land in Puerto Reno, check in, and settle into QUESTFEST week before the main harbor rhythm kicks in.
details: Meet at the Reno Arch corridor and pregame staging near Virginia St.
Pick up your pass rhythm on Capitan's Bridge — listen before you roam.
Light orientation to Downtown Zone A boundaries on the park map (page 5 of the Frontier Guide).

items.label: Pimp Your Bike Workshop
items.title: Pimp Your Bike Workshop
items.zone: Midtown Reno · Zone B (Truckee River north to Mary St)
items.summary: Customize your ride for the week — paint, lights, sound, and holographic vibe coding hooks for the street fleet.
details: Workshop runs in Midtown between Plumas and Holcomb — see park map.
Bring your bike or coordinate a loaner through the harbor crew.
Optional tie-in to holographic vibe coding workshops the same day.

items.label: Optional daily excursions & holographic vibe coding workshops
items.title: Optional Daily Excursions & Holographic Vibe Coding Workshops
items.zone: Downtown & Midtown · optional runs beyond the core grid
items.summary: Self-directed day trips plus hands-on holographic vibe coding — build small interactive layers on the QUESTFEST stack.
details: Excursions: Sierra day loops, river edge walks, or custom crew outings — sign up at the bulletin board.
Vibe coding: plain-speak intro to the holographic Goldilocks layer — not a graphics card; edge pipes and catalog fidelity.
Start with Look Under the Hood if you want the paper catalog synthesized in human language.

items.label: Pregame balling at Man Cave
items.title: Pregame Balling at Man Cave
items.summary: Pregame energy in the Man Cave — music, tables, and the first full-throated night of the week.
details: Dress code: come correct for Puerto Reno — donde se vibea.
Members pass honored on the Bridge; tables by invitation where noted.
Connects to Friday/Saturday VIP table rhythm — this is the warm-up.

items.label: Optional daily excursions & holographic vibe coding workshops
items.title: Optional Daily Excursions & Holographic Vibe Coding Workshops
items.summary: Repeatable optional track — excursions and vibe coding workshops available again for crews who missed Thursday or want a second pass.
details: Same excursion desk as Thursday; new routes may open based on weather and crew size.
Vibe coding deepens: catalog surfaces, bulletin board posts, and edge onboarding patterns.
Pair with hot springs or river walk later for a full Friday arc.

items.label: Hot springs soak
items.title: Hot Springs Soak
items.summary: Recovery soak between harbor nights — geothermal reset before sunset mixer and Man Cave.
details: Transport coordinated from bulletin board signup.
Pack water, towel, and Fair Exchange mindset — leave no trace.
Return in time for river walk sunset mixer.

items.label: River walk sunset mixer
items.title: River Walk Sunset Mixer
items.zone: Truckee · Rebel River edge · Downtown south / Midtown north
items.summary: Walk the river corridor at golden hour — the geographic seam between Downtown and Midtown on the park map.
details: Meet at the Truckee River boundary (Zone A south / Zone B north on the map).
Sunset mixer: light bites, introductions, solar-coupling story color from Look at the Sun deck.
Leads into VIP table at Man Cave.

items.label: VIP table at Man Cave
items.title: VIP Table at Man Cave
items.summary: Reserved table night — full harbor service, curated menus, and Bridge-forward listening.
details: Bison, elk, wild salmon menus per Bachstage pass tier where applicable.
Table maps to Downtown corridor energy on the amusement-park map.
Members perreo country follows later — pace yourself.

items.label: Members perreo country · late night
items.title: Members Perreo Country · Late Night
items.summary: Members-only perreo country set — late night movement culture on the Midtown grid.
details: Members pass required; honor rail on the Bridge.
Midtown zone (Plumas–Holcomb) is the story geography for this night.
After party is invitation-only — separate listing.

items.label: After party · invitation only
items.title: After Party · Invitation Only
items.summary: Closed-circle after party — invitation from table hosts or Capitan crew only.
details: Not on the public park map — respect the seal.
Fair Exchange and NSPFRNP catalog fidelity apply inside the room.
Saturday repeats the pattern for crews staying through the weekend.

items.label: Optional daily excursions & holographic vibe coding workshops
items.title: Optional Daily Excursions & Holographic Vibe Coding Workshops
items.summary: Saturday optional track — last open day for excursions and vibe coding before Sunday departures.
details: Final signup window for Sierra excursions.
Vibe coding capstone: ship a small bulletin-board-ready artifact.
Good day to read one paper from the synthesized catalog primer.

items.label: Hot springs soak
items.title: Hot Springs Soak
items.summary: Second-chance soak for crews who skipped Friday or want a quieter Saturday reset.
details: Same logistics as Friday — bulletin board signup.
Return for river walk and VIP rhythm.

items.label: River walk sunset mixer
items.title: River Walk Sunset Mixer
items.summary: Saturday sunset repeat — peak weekend energy on the river seam.
details: Highest attendance night for the mixer.
Photo-friendly golden hour at the Downtown/Midtown boundary.
Feeds Saturday VIP and late night.

items.label: VIP table at Man Cave
items.title: VIP Table at Man Cave
items.summary: Peak VIP table night — Saturday is the flagship harbor dinner.
details: Reserve through harbor crew; Bachstage pass holders prioritized.
Full curated menu and specialized drinks per QUESTFEST tier.

items.label: Members perreo country · late night
items.title: Members Perreo Country · Late Night
items.summary: Saturday peak dance night — perreo country until the lights come up.
details: Members pass · Bridge honor rail.
Midtown Mary St southern edge is your geographic footer on the map.

items.label: After party · invitation only
items.title: After Party · Invitation Only
items.summary: Weekend capstone after party — invitations from Saturday table hosts.
details: Invitation only — no walk-ins.
Sunday departures follow for travelers leaving early.

items.label: Departures
items.title: Departures
items.summary: Checkout and departures — gratitude lap around the park map before wheels up.
details: Final Bridge listen optional on the road.
Bulletin board stays live 24×365 — the harbor does not close.
Frontier Guide and papers remain on the site after you leave.

items.label: Early evening decompress at Man Cave
items.title: Early Evening Decompress at Man Cave
items.summary: Soft landing for locals and late departures — decompress, no full program.
details: Chill tables, early evening only.
Staff transition to Monday–Wednesday rhythm.

items.label: Staff chill nights · early evenings at Man Cave
items.title: Staff Chill Nights · Early Evenings at Man Cave
items.summary: Early-week staff recovery — harbor crew resets while the public park map stays posted online.
details: Not full QUESTFEST week programming — internal rhythm.
Site, Bridge, and bulletin board remain operational 24×365.
Good nights to catch up on the whitepaper catalog synthesis.

related.label: Look Under the Hood · catalog primer
